documentationSkill.description: Skill command that orchestrates agent-driven documentation generation

templateScaffold.signature: scaffoldDocTemplates(cwd: string, scope: string): string[] (list of template paths created)
templateScaffold.description: Create documentation templates for the specified scope if they do not already exist

extractChangelog.description: Extract changelog entries from git history and RAPID artifacts for a milestone

diffAwareUpdate.signature: updateDocSection(docPath: string, sectionId: string, newContent: string): { updated: boolean, diff: string }
diffAwareUpdate.description: Update a specific section of an existing doc file without overwriting unrelated sections

docCliCommands.signature: rapid-tools docs generate [--scope <s>] | docs list | docs diff <milestone>

diffAware.description: Documentation updates modify only changed sections; unchanged sections are preserved exactly as-is

templateIdempotent.description: Running scaffoldDocTemplates multiple times never overwrites existing templates

gitHistoryBased.description: Changelog extraction uses git log and RAPID artifacts (ROADMAP.md, set definitions) as source of truth, never fabricates entries
